lore_entries.content: You ee the outside of test chamber. you see each of the person who operating the test chamber is a cube wearing full white suit. you see a lot of button, and one of the button said reset.

You went to the test generator. you see each test chamber generated by machine. on top of the generator, there is a box called Gameplay Algorithm System. it have cable that connected to the generator. Also you see a glimpse of a white blinding light from one spot, there is a text but you cant see it, a very white cube enetered every century, and there is a text but its too far to read.

You walk around the facility. you see an room with many screens. each screen showing a test chamber. you try to get in. inside, there is a desk with many buttons and screens. On one of the screens, you see a camera view of Test Chamber 193. you see yourself at there, escaping the test chamber trough the ventilation systems. as you see other test chamber, you see a lot of deatchs and person entering white blinding door and never came back.
You see cubes white suit cubes walk around the facility. every cubes has an id on the top, its the same id as the id you see. but you see the one with red and blue gradient. and its not an id as well

you see a glowing white light on the corner of the room. you walk closer to it. and you see 12 energy cubes, and every container has 3 energy cubes. Emiting a energy the same as 10 blackholes for each cubes
